title: Wurger
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Wurger_mcrv.jpg|thumb|right|250px|''Wurger 2'' under fire.]]
'''Wurger''' was group of [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvettes]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], that contained troops for [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Harkov]]'s fleet. They were eventually destroyed by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] pilot [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]].

==Behind the scenes==
Wurger goes as a group of 2 corvettes which appear in 2 missions; firstly, before the [[Protector (Victory I-class)|''Protector'']]{{'s}} departure of [[DS 5]]; and subsequently when DS 5 is captured. However, as a secret objective both corvettes in both missions have to be destroyed. This makes it unclear if there are 2 or 4 Assassin-class corvettes.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
